Recipe.title: Recipe
Recipe.description: Represents a culinary recipe, detailing its name, creation date, and aggregated cost information, including embedded ingredients.

name.description: The name given to the recipe.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the recipe was first created, stored as a Firestore Timestamp.

ingredients.description: Embedded array of ingredient objects used in this recipe.

definition.description: Stores individual recipe documents. Each document contains all recipe data, including an embedded array of ingredients. No user authentication is required, making all recipes publicly accessible for read and write operations.
